summary: Retest after legacy-sale compatibility fix. Backend GET /api/sales now returns 200 with 11 sales (including legacy docs). PUT /api/sales/{id} works end-to-end (verified 35000->40000->35000 round-trip). DailySidebar UI renders all records with totals (VENTAS $121.345, EGRESOS $459.656, OTROS $6.300), edit/delete icons visible per record, and edit modal opens pre-filled with all fields (Producto, Cantidad, Precio, Total, Metodo Pago, Incluye IVA, Cliente).
passed: GET /api/sales returns HTTP 200 with 11 sales (legacy + new) - PRIMARY FIX CONFIRMED
PUT /api/sales/{id} returns HTTP 200 and persists updated total (verified via GET)
DailySidebar (Registros del Dia) displays totals: VENTAS, EGRESOS, OTROS
Edit (pencil) and Delete (trash) buttons visible on each sidebar record (16 buttons detected)
Edit modal opens with all fields pre-filled (Producto Editado, qty=2, price=15000, total=35000, payment=Tarjeta, IVA checked, Cliente=Cliente Test)
Modal has Cancelar and Guardar buttons
Real-time metrics card (Tienda A/B/General) renders with Compras/Utilidades/IVA/Egresos
notes: End-to-end UI edit-and-save round-trip via Playwright was not completed in the second pass due to Lucide icon class selector mismatch in test script (NOT a product bug). However, modal-open-with-prefilled-data was confirmed in first pass screenshot, and the underlying PUT endpoint was validated directly against backend. Manual confirmation reported by main agent ($30k->$35k reflected in sidebar + metrics) is consistent with backend + UI evidence gathered here.
